---
title: "Publications"
nocite: |
  @*

title-block-banner: true

format:
  html:
    description: "Peer-reviewed publications by Laszlo Szabo on kidney and pancreas transplantation, organ preservation, donor risk stratification, and surgical outcomes."
# toc: true
# toc-depth: 2.0
---

::: {#refs}
:::
